text.title: Scope Creep Prevention On Hourly — Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact produced by `scope-creep-prevention-on-hourly`. Validator enforces required keys, owner discipline, semver, ISO date, and minimum-evidence rules.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "scope-creep-prevention-on-hourly-2026-05-23-01", "owner": "Anna Schmidt", "decision": "ship the canonical artefact this client cycle", "rationale": "Anchored to discovery notes (2026-05-21) and rate card; precondition checklist passed.", "inputs_used": [ "discovery-notes-2026-05-21.md", "rate-card-2026-Q2.yaml" ], "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23" }

example.note: artefact_id too short; owner is a team not a person; decision empty; rationale defensive without citations; inputs_used empty; version not semver; last_reviewed not ISO date.

antipattern.reason: Plural ownership = no ownership; future readers need a named human to chase.

antipattern.description: rationale that does not reference any input by name
antipattern.reason: Post-hoc justification masquerading as evidence-based decision.
Output is ungrounded; the artefact cannot be falsified.
